'''Vyram''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] from [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] who worked as a [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] during the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He was one of the core members of the [[Freedom resistance movement]], and a close friend of its founder, [[Malinza Thanas]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}
